eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Travis, TX; at 4:08 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 5:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Travis County: Lake Travis Water is rising. LCRA to open Mansfield Dam floodgates on 7/18. Stay safe. Be water aware. Take action to protect people and property.
